subjects.description: full visual description of the subject (appearance, clothing, identifying features)
subjects.relationship: how this subject relates to others or to the scene
subjects.relative_size: size within frame (e.g., 'Small within frame', 'Medium within frame', 'Large within frame')
subjects.orientation: direction subject faces relative to camera
subjects.state_changes: how pose or action changes; 'No significant change.' if static
subjects.clothing: clothing and accessories; '' if non-human or not visible
subjects.expression: facial expression; '' if non-human or not visible
subjects.facial_features: notable facial features, including eye shape/color, hair color/style, lip shape, wrinkles, moles, scars, freckles, facial hair, and other visible fine-grained facial attributes; '' if non-human or not visible
subjects.number_of_subjects: int; total in this subject group, 0 if N/A

background_setting: full prose description of the environment and setting

lighting.conditions: type and quality of light (e.g., 'Bright daylight', 'Overcast', 'Studio lighting')
lighting.direction: where light comes from (e.g., 'top-lit', 'front-lit', 'side-lit from right')
lighting.illumination_effect: overall effect of the lighting on the scene

aesthetics.patterns: notable repeating visual patterns; '' if none

actions.description: what happens in this timed interval

text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: position in scene and when visible
text_and_signage_elements.context: purpose or meaning of the text

transitions: transition description between segments; empty list [] if single continuous shot
temporal_caption: a temporally coherent, second-by-second natural-language narrative of the whole video
audio_description: a natural-language description of the audio: speech, music, ambient, and notable effects
